scope: Add the operator-approved adaptive music program to the work orders as planning/templating only: queue entries, work order, production contract, prompt packs for the music-authoring LLM and the Codex M8str0 tooling lane, and the machine manifest - the same treatment FQ-09A gave visual assets. No runtime audio code.
summary: The hybrid adaptive score is now a governed program. docs/WORK_ORDER_FQ_09U_ADAPTIVE_MUSIC.md defines three bounded runtime increments: FQ-09U1 (full-mix context loops surface_day/surface_night/underground/crisis with bar-quantized same-position crossfades on AudioStreamInteractive, data-defined hysteresis - enter crisis at pressure>0.60 for 2s, exit below 0.35 for 6s, minimum 1-bar hold, next-bar normal / next-beat emergency transitions - a dedicated manifest loader rather than BlockRegistry creep, a narrow new game_root event surface because the scout verified game_root emits no signals today, missing-asset fail-safe, and music state never entering saves), FQ-09U2 (AudioStreamSynchronized stems foundation/hearth/motion/pressure/attunement/fracture weighted by pressure/Coherence/Resilience/Attunement from the existing 5s settlement updated signal), FQ-09U3 (stingers over temporary ducking, volume settings, pause behavior, final asset validation). U1 is explicitly gated on Codex's Godot 4.6 spike (including proving at runtime whether AudioStreamSynchronized can nest as an AudioStreamInteractive clip) and the M8-AUDIO-01 review. audio/source_templates/MUSIC_TEMPLATE.md locks the production contract - one adaptive suite, 72 BPM, 4/4, 16 bars = exactly 53.333s, D Dorian/pentatonic family, phrases on bars 1/5/9/13, sample-clean loop edges, WAV masters to OGG runtime, exact naming - plus canon-derived mood vocabulary (palette roles mapped to instrumentation), context and stem briefs (any stem subset must remain musical), prompt packs for the music-authoring LLM, the three bounded M8str0 increment prompts (loop-locked master recording first; offline deterministic rendering explicitly out of scope; manual capture acceptable so Coheronia is never blocked), and a render checklist ending in operator approval by ear. data/music_manifest.json is the machine contract, validator-checked for the musical grid, all four contexts, and crisis hysteresis direction. The audio/ skeleton exists, including audio/opening/ - the FQ-09C prologue cue hooks' target directory.
acceptance: Queue updated with FQ-09U1/U2/U3 after FQ-09M (FQ-10 regated on U3), operator approval and placement recorded - no silent queue bypass

Work order cites scout-verified symbols (settlement updated signal + 5s tick, current_threat_severity, cave-spawn underground rule, sky_line, zero game_root signals) rather than the conversation's paraphrases
Production contract, manifest, template, and queue agree exactly on grid (72/4/16 = 53.333s), context names, stem names, stinger names, and thresholds (verifier-confirmed)
Prompt packs are self-sufficient for the music-authoring LLM and for Codex (spike requirements + M8-AUDIO-01/02/03 bounded prompts)
Music state specified transient in every increment; no save-schema change permitted
Validator green with the new files/dirs/content checks; suite unchanged 210/210; zero runtime .gd/.tscn modifications (verifier-confirmed)
validation: python scripts/validate_repo.py -> PASS incl. adaptive music planning contract checks
COHERONIA_SMOKE=1 waited windowed run -> 210/210 PASS at 2026-07-10T12:51:59
haiku read-only verifier -> NO FINDINGS (7/7 fact-check items)
decisions: Placement: the U increments join AFTER FQ-09M and before FQ-10 (the conversation's 'add after the presentation sequence' option); the operator may pull U1 ahead at any time by saying so
Native Godot 4.6 only - AudioStreamInteractive/AudioStreamSynchronized; no FMOD/Wwise/middleware, no runtime AI music generation; M8str0 is authoring/rendering only and never embedded
One piece with multiple compatible states, never four unrelated songs - composition creates seamlessness, the engine preserves it; composition risk leads the register
Storms contribute to pressure (and later a texture layer) instead of forcing a fifth context - avoids the state matrix explosion
A dedicated music_manifest loader, not BlockRegistry - no service-locator creep
U1 needs a narrow game_root event surface (nightfall/dawn/storm/raid) because game_root declares no signals today - kept deliberately narrow to avoid an event-bus refactor in disguise
Manual/real-time loop capture is acceptable first; refactoring M8str0 to a deterministic OfflineAudioContext renderer is explicitly out of scope
Swarm: 1 haiku symbol-verification scout, lead authorship, 1 haiku fact-check verifier
risks: The Godot spike (incl. Synchronized-inside-Interactive nesting) is unexecuted and gates U1; it belongs to the Codex lane outside this repo's production scene
M8str0 increments are not started; first loops may be captured manually so Coheronia is never blocked
Pressure normalization divisors are provisional and data-tunable; U1 smoke asserts threshold behavior, not divisor values
Every asset's final gate is the operator listening - spec compliance alone cannot accept music
next_action: Queue head FQ-09M. Parallel Codex lane: Godot 4.6 audio spike + M8-AUDIO-01 using the template's prompts; operator approves the shared motif by ear.
